output: Batch 3 executed. Added the standalone useTimelineHistory hook, wired transaction ids into drag/resize and multi-clip keyboard track moves, marked only the specified destructive operations as semantic, widened the shared edit-option type surface in useTimelineData.ts to match the new transactionId/semantic options, and checkpointed progress to .megaplan/plans/implement-undo-redo-history-20260326-2240/execution_batch_3.json. A repo-wide TypeScript check passed.

task_updates.executor_notes: Created src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineHistory.ts with undo/redo stacks held in refs and capped at 100, canUndo/canRedo state synced on empty/non-empty transitions, and an onBeforeCommit callback that snapshots currentData.config and signature before commits. Verified transaction collapsing handles exact transactionId matches separately from a 300ms untransacted debounce window, undo/redo rebuild via buildDataFromCurrentRegistry and call commitData with { save: true, skipHistory: true }, checkpoint triggers cover session boundary, edit distance, and semantic edits, checkpoints load on mount, jumpToCheckpoint clears both stacks before restoring, and createManualCheckpoint persists the current config immediately.

Updated drag and resize gesture paths to generate a transactionId at gesture start and reuse it for all applyTimelineEdit-backed mutations within that gesture. Verified useClipDrag stores one transactionId on the drag session and forwards it through same-track moves, cross-track moves that use moveClipToRow, and multi-clip applyTimelineEdit commits; verified useClipResize allocates one transactionId on resize start and forwards it on resize commit.

Updated useTimelineTrackManagement so moveClipToRow accepts and forwards an optional transactionId into applyTimelineEdit, and verified moveSelectedClipsToTrack generates one crypto.randomUUID() before the move loop and passes that same transactionId to every moveClipToRow call in the batch.

Marked only destructive operations as semantic. Verified handleDeleteClips passes { semantic: true } to applyTimelineEdit, handleRemoveTrack passes { semantic: true } to applyResolvedConfigEdit, and handleClearUnusedTracks passes { semantic: true } to applyResolvedConfigEdit; non-destructive track operations remain unchanged.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed onBeforeCommit snapshots currentData.config, transaction collapsing handles exact transactionId matches separately from the 300ms debounce path, undo/redo restore via commitData({ save: true, skipHistory: true }), and checkpoint triggers cover session boundary, edit distance, and semantic edits.
Confirmed drag and resize generate a transactionId at gesture start and reuse that same id for every applyTimelineEdit-backed mutation in the gesture.
Confirmed moveClipToRow now accepts and forwards an optional transactionId, and moveSelectedClipsToTrack creates one transactionId before the loop and passes it to every moveClipToRow call.
Confirmed only handleDeleteClips, handleRemoveTrack, and handleClearUnusedTracks are marked semantic; addTrack, moveTrack, trackPopoverChange, and createTrackAndMoveClip were left non-semantic.
